snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Windows x64 packageability current-only governance review
reviewers.independence: Project Management independently reviewed the exact eleven-file Development candidate and seven pre-recipe governed files read-only. It verified the cross-platform evidence boundary, unchanged statuses, four-claim semantic delta, dependency record and capacity gates, returned CLEAR, and made no file edits.

dimensions.summary: Existing Release, Quality, Technical Architecture, Playbook, dependency and trace owners absorb the Windows x64 packageability evidence; no document, user data lifecycle or product surface is added.

Owners agree on unsigned macOS arm64 and Windows x64 packageability, exact ASAR validation, an app-owned packaged BrowserWindow renderer/preload/health probe, body-free reports, and still-open signing, installed, update, OCR and platform-breadth work.
Semantic lock v3 retains 1,184 claims and changes only the planned residuals for PIGE-REL-001, PIGE-REL-004, PIGE-REL-005 and E9.08; all Requirement, Exit and phase status values remain unchanged.

Development gets one strict cross-platform preflight contract: canonical ASAR entries, real packaged renderer/preload/IPC readiness, reviewed failure stages, platform-specific resources, and explicit missing-tool truth without a public-release overclaim.
No Markdown file or durable decision is added; the exact existing owner sections and four compact planned targets keep LEN-001 through LEN-005 within their ratcheted budgets.

verification.evidence: The exact eleven-file Development plus eight-file governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

Windows x64 job 87065940770 and macOS 26 arm64 job 87065940791 pass exact unsigned builds, strict ASAR/resources/SBOM checks, actual packaged renderer/preload/health IPC, embedded Pi/Home, parser/index workers, bounded reports and artifact upload; macOS retains packaged Vision proof.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 56 dependency records with zero waivers, CON-001 through CON-004, semantic lock v3 with 1,184 claims, and four planned acceptance changes without Requirement, Exit or phase status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 55 Markdown files, 3,449 of 3,700 entry words, 4,577 trace lines, 249,904 of 250,000 trace bytes and 1,209,093 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.compatibility: This candidate extends the existing unsigned packageability preflight from macOS arm64 to Windows x64 and repairs reviewed Windows directory-fsync portability. It preserves macOS behavior and does not claim public installers, signed or installed-platform readiness, updater behavior, Windows OCR, Windows 10/11 breadth, or E9.08 completion.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact eleven-file bytes after local and online Windows/macOS evidence. Product Planning synchronized seven pre-recipe owners and the current recipe without changing Development files. Project Management independently reviewed the exact candidate and returned CLEAR.

nonBlockingRisks: Both artifacts are unsigned packageability preflights, not public installers or production-ready releases.
One Windows 2025 x64 runner does not prove Windows 10 and Windows 11 breadth, installed upgrade/uninstall, or broader hardware compatibility.
Windows native OCR remains unavailable in this candidate; macOS packaged Vision evidence is preserved.
Signing, notarization, hardened runtime and manual signed installed-platform evidence remain open.
Update metadata and alpha-to-alpha update behavior remain open.
Packaged memory, 10,000-page/100,000-chunk scale and post-heavy-Job recovery reports remain open.
Git, Bun, uv and PaddleOCR remain explicit missing tools rather than being silently reported ready.
Online packageability artifacts expire; governance binds the reproducible workflow and bounded report contract rather than committing generated binaries.
